zh.title: 应用设置
zh.exportInventorySummary: 将全部库存导出为 Excel 文件
zh.importInventorySummary: 从 Excel 文件导入并覆盖当前库存
zh.aboutBody: LCSC Android ERP 用于在 Android 设备上完成立创物料扫码、入库和库存管理。
zh.stackBody:
Android 原生 Kotlin + Compose，依赖通过应用级容器管理，本地业务库使用 Room + SQLite，设置存储使用 DataStore，网络层预留 Retrofit + OkHttp。
作者: BrokenClient@foxmail.com

en.title: Settings
en.exportInventorySummary: Export all inventory as an Excel file
en.importInventorySummary: Import from an Excel file and overwrite current inventory
en.aboutBody: LCSC Android ERP is used on Android devices for LCSC material scanning, inbound processing, and inventory management.
en.stackBody:
Native Android Kotlin + Compose, with dependencies managed through an application-level container. Room + SQLite is used for local business data, DataStore stores settings, and the network layer is reserved for Retrofit + OkHttp.
Author: BrokenClient@foxmail.com
